product_overview: Sinyal is a social media content intelligence SaaS that lets creators, agencies, and brands search viral content, analyze creator profiles, extract comments, and export results (JSON/CSV) across multiple platforms. The backend is a FastAPI service with Supabase auth and quota enforcement, and provides public pages for marketing and the SPA app shell.
core_goals: Provide fast keyword-based discovery of trending social media content (TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, X, Facebook) with exportable results.
Enable profile-level analysis and comment extraction for deeper creator insights.
Enforce tiered quotas (Guest/Free/Starter/Pro/Lifetime) and guide users to upgrade when limits are reached.
Secure user authentication and session management via Supabase with clear onboarding flow.
Support a simple payment integration and webhook to upgrade user plans immediately after payment.

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public marketing homepage that introduces Sinyal and links to app, signup, and payment pages.
user_flows: GET / with no auth -> Receive 200 HTML (landing page)
GET / with server error condition -> Receive 500 HTML or error response

features.name: App Page (SPA shell)
features.description: Main single-page application shell served to users; free-tier users can access the app shell and then call APIs for data.
user_flows: GET /app without auth -> Receive 200 HTML (SPA shell)
GET /app with server misconfiguration -> Receive 500 HTML

features.name: Auth Pages (Sign In / Sign Up / Start)
features.description: Public pages for user registration, onboarding start, and sign-in flows.
user_flows: GET /signup -> Receive 200 HTML (signup form)
GET /signin -> Receive 200 HTML (signin form)
GET /start -> Receive 200 HTML (onboarding start page)
GET /signup while service rate-limited -> Receive 429 {error: string}

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Signup, signin, and signout backed by Supabase; creates accounts, issues tokens, and clears sessions.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signup with body {email, password, full_name, company_name, onboarding_use_case} -> Receive 200 {message: string} -> GET /start -> Receive 200 HTML
POST /api/auth/signup with an already-registered email -> Receive 400 {error: string}
POST /api/auth/signin with body {email, password} -> Receive 200 {access_token: string, user: object} -> GET /app with sinyal_access_token cookie -> Receive 200 HTML
POST /api/auth/signin with unconfirmed email or wrong credentials -> Receive 400 {error: string}
POST /api/auth/signout with cookies present -> Receive 200 {message: string} -> GET / -> Receive 200 HTML

features.name: Search API (Riset)
features.description: Keyword-based search for trending content; returns results and links to exported JSON/CSV files. Enforced by quota and plan filters.
user_flows: GET /api/search?keyword=viral+dance&platforms=TikTok&max_results=20&sort=views -> Receive 200 {results: array, json_file: string, csv_file: string} -> GET /api/download?file=<csv_file> -> Receive 200 file content
GET /api/search?keyword=example&platforms=TikTok&max_results=5 without including required query params -> Receive 400 {error: string}
GET /api/search?keyword=any as authenticated user after daily quota exhausted -> Receive 402 {error: string, upgrade_url: "/payment"}
GET /api/search repeated too quickly from same IP as guest -> Receive 429 {error: string}

features.name: Profile API (Profil)
features.description: Fetch and return videos from a creator profile (TikTok) for profile analysis; requires authentication and respects plan quotas.
user_flows: GET /api/profile?username=@creator&max_results=10 with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 {results: array} -> GET /api/download?file=<json_file_from_profile> -> Receive 200 file content
GET /api/profile?username=@creator&max_results=10 without Authorization header -> Receive 401 {error: string}
GET /api/profile?username=invalid_user with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 400 {error: string}
GET /api/profile with Authorization when user's plan disallows platform -> Receive 402 {error: string}

features.name: Comments API (Komentar)
features.description: Scrape and return comments for a TikTok video URL; supports max_comments parameter and requires authentication.
user_flows: GET /api/comments?video_url=https://www.tiktok.com/@u/video/12345&max_comments=5 with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 {comments: array, video_comment_count: integer}
GET /api/comments?video_url=malformed_url&max_comments=5 with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 400 {error: string}
GET /api/comments?video_url=https://www.tiktok.com/@u/video/12345 without Authorization -> Receive 401 {error: string}
GET /api/comments?video_url=<old_video> with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 but comments array may be empty (known limitation)

features.name: Account Usage API
features.description: Return authenticated user's plan, quota, and profile info so frontend can show remaining searches and next onboarding steps.
user_flows: GET /api/account/usage with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 {configured: bool, plan: object, profile: object, user: object}
GET /api/account/usage with expired or missing token -> Receive 401 {error: string}

features.name: Download / Export API
features.description: Serve previously generated JSON or CSV exports produced by search/profile operations.
user_flows: GET /api/download?file=results_2026-03-26.csv -> Receive 200 file content (CSV)
GET /api/download?file=nonexistent_file.json -> Receive 404 {error: string}
GET /api/download?file=protected_file without proper access (if export restricted) -> Receive 400 or 401 {error: string}

features.name: Payment Webhook & Plan Upgrade
features.description: Receive Mayar.id payment webhooks to verify purchases and immediately update user profiles/tiers in Supabase.
user_flows: POST /api/payment/webhook/mayar with valid webhook payload and signature -> Receive 200 {message: string} -> Backend updates profiles.tier and daily_searches_left in Supabase
POST /api/payment/webhook/mayar with invalid signature -> Receive 400 {error: string}

features.name: Quota & Tier Enforcement
features.description: Server-side enforcement of per-role quotas (Guest/Free/Starter/Pro/Lifetime), daily reset logic, and upgrade prompts when limits are reached.
user_flows: GET /api/account/usage with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 {plan: {tier, daily_searches_left}, user: {...}} -> GET /api/search?keyword=test with Authorization -> Receive 200 {results: array} -> GET /api/account/usage with Authorization -> Receive 200 showing daily_searches_left decremented
Run repeated GET /api/search until quota exhausted -> Final GET /api/search attempt returns 429 {error: string, upgrade_url: "/payment"} -> GET /payment -> Receive 200 HTML (pricing/payment page)

known_limitations.issue: Comments scraping on old TikTok videos may return 0 comments
known_limitations.impact: TikTok may not expose comments for very old videos via scraping

known_limitations.issue: Email confirmation required before signin (Supabase default)
known_limitations.impact: New signups cannot sign in until email is confirmed

known_limitations.issue: DEV_AUTH_BYPASS available for testing but disabled in production
known_limitations.impact: Protected endpoints require valid Supabase JWT in production
